events.text: Diagnosed the fault: a splice made outside an enclosure violates NEC 110.14(B), which requires all splices to be contained in an accessible box with a cover. Written to `/app/answer.json` as a **fail**, **high risk** finding (non-compliant/installed-defective/degraded), with corrective actions to de-energize, install a proper junction box, remake the splice with listed connectors, and re-test before re-energizing.
